task: Put the white piece of clothing on the seat.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cloth is draped over the back of an orange chair. The cloth is soft and hangs down the backrest. The chair is in a room with a carpeted floor and a door in the background. STRATEGY - The task is to move the white cloth from the back of the chair to the seat. First, reach for the cloth at its hanging part, grasp it, then transport it to the seat area and place it there. Failure modes include not grasping the cloth properly or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cloth at its hanging part; Step 2 grasp the cloth for secure hold; Step 3 transport the cloth to the seat; Step 4 place the cloth on the seat.**
Goal: on(white_cloth, seat); stable(white_cloth)
Scene: white_cloth, orange_chair, seat
Step 1: reach(white_cloth)
  affordance_region: the hanging part of the white cloth
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_cloth, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_cloth) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_cloth)
  affordance_region: the hanging part of the white cloth
  contact: holding(white_cloth) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_cloth)
Step 3: transport(white_cloth -> seat)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the seat
  spatial: above(white_cloth, seat, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(white_cloth)
  done_when: above(white_cloth, seat, 0.05)
Step 4: place(white_cloth -> seat)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the seat
  contact: surface_contact(white_cloth, seat) [completion]; released(white_cloth) [completion]
  pose: stable(white_cloth) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(white_cloth, seat) AND released(white_cloth)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the hanging part of the white cloth
the hanging part of the white cloth
an empty area on the seat
an empty area on the seat
